title: System and Method for Adaptive Mental Health Assessment Using Machine Learning
abstract: AI-driven conversational agent that adapts psychometric assessments based on user responses using IRT models.
relevance: Competitor in AI-powered psychiatric assessment space

title: Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning with Differential Privacy Guarantees
abstract: Method for training ML models on user data with formal differential privacy guarantees while maintaining model accuracy.
relevance: Apple's DP implementation may set industry standard that ÆLYA must match or exceed

title: Federated Learning System for Healthcare Data
abstract: Federated learning architecture specifically designed for healthcare institutions with heterogeneous data formats.
relevance: Direct competitor approach to ÆLYA federated health data analytics

title: Blockchain-Based Consent Management for Personal Data
abstract: Decentralized consent management platform using blockchain to record and enforce data usage permissions.
relevance: Could constrain ÆLYA consent architecture if broadly enforced

title: Quantum-Resistant Cryptographic Key Exchange Protocol
abstract: Lattice-based key exchange protocol designed for post-quantum security in enterprise communications.
relevance: IBM's PQ implementation — BURHAN must ensure interoperability

title: Zero-Knowledge Proof System for Verifiable Computation in Cloud Environments
abstract: Efficient ZK-STARK proof generation for verifiable computation in distributed cloud systems.
relevance: zkSync technology — potential BURHAN integration or competition

title: AI Model Authentication Using Cryptographic Fingerprinting
abstract: Method to create unique cryptographic fingerprints of AI models to detect unauthorized copies or modifications.
relevance: Could block BURHAN AI authentication feature if claims are broad

title: Personal Data Marketplace with Automated Pricing
abstract: Decentralized marketplace for personal data streams with algorithmic pricing based on data quality and demand.
relevance: Direct competitor to MYNε data marketplace

title: Knowledge Graph Construction from Expert Interactions
abstract: System for automatically constructing knowledge graphs from expert user interactions and domain-specific workflows.
relevance: Overlaps with YrKnown tacit knowledge digitization approach

title: Cross-Border Digital Currency Settlement System
abstract: Real-time cross-border settlement using bridged digital currencies with automatic FX conversion.
relevance: Ripple's settlement technology — MIZAN must differentiate or integrate

title: Multi-Agent System for Geospatial Intelligence Fusion
abstract: Platform combining multiple AI agents for geospatial data fusion, anomaly detection, and territorial analysis.
relevance: Direct competition to RAQIB territorial intelligence capability

title: Digital Phenotyping for Predictive Mental Health Monitoring
abstract: Smartphone-based digital phenotyping using keystroke dynamics and usage patterns for psychiatric prediction.
relevance: Could constrain NOOS digital phenotyping features
